lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Mk II
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, price, and outfitting reference for the Krait Mk II.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Mk II hull profile, hardpoints, fighter-hangar capability, and role notes.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Livestream build outfitting a Krait Mk II for anti-Xeno combat: shieldless high-DPS loadout, Gauss/Guardian hardpoints, and distributor setup.
